name: Braised Beef Cube Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cream Of Mushroom Soup (10 1/2 oz)
1 can Cream Of Celery Soup (10 1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut stew meat into small cubes.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large covered casserole or Dutch Oven.
3. Stir until well blended.
4. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F. (150 degrees C).
5. Bake for 3 to 4 hours, or until the meat is tender.
6. Cool completely.
7. Transfer into eight 1-pint freezer containers, leaving 1/2-inch space at the top.
8. Seal and label as BRAISED BEEF CUBES MIX.
9. Store in the freezer for up to 3 months.
